title: FIESTAS GUIRCA Shackles - Realistic Prisoner Handcuffs, High-Quality Costume Accessory, Perfect for Halloween, Themed Parties, and Cosplay, Durable and Comfortable Design
features: REALISTIC DESIGN - Features a convincing look with heavy iron cuffs and a connecting chain, perfect for creating an authentic prisoner or medieval character.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS - Made from durable and lightweight materials, ensuring longevity and comfortable wear.
COMFORTABLE FIT - Designed to be worn for extended periods without discomfort, making them ideal for parties and performances.
VERSATILE USE - Perfect for Halloween, themed parties, cosplay, theatrical performances, and more.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Built to withstand repeated use, ensuring these shackles remain a staple in your costume collection.
description: Product Description Welcome to FIESTAS GUIRCA! Personalized Attention At Fiestas Guirca, we are passionate about delivering quality and creativity in every product. With years of experience in the party and costume industry, we focus on offering a wide range of original and fun items to make every celebration unforgettable. Facilities Our facilities cover 20,000 m², including 2,000 m² of offices where we have key departments such as Administration, Quality Control, Purchasing and Imports, Marketing, Product Design and Development, Sales, and Accounting. Creativity and Innovation We promote creativity and innovation in all aspects of our business to offer unique and appealing products. We love to innovate and surprise with our items, always looking for the latest trends. Commitment We are dedicated to delivering high-quality products that meet European regulations and standards. With a focus on reliability and excellence, we foster strong collaborations and continually seek to innovate in everything we offer. Celebrate Your Parties in Style! CARNIVAL Carnival, Halloween, Christmas, or any special occasion—at Fiestas Guirca we have the perfect costume for you to shine with style and fun. Quality, originality, and joy for all ages. HALLOWEEN Discover our collection of terrifyingly original costumes and accessories. From witches and vampires to skeletons and monsters, we have everything you need for an unforgettable night of scares. MAKE UP Create spooky, fun, or fantastic looks with our easy-to-apply, skin-safe makeup kits. Fake blood, scars, glitter, face paint, and more. Your makeup will be the star of the party. CHRISTMAS Santa Claus costumes, elves, reindeer and much more to fill every corner of your Christmas celebration with magic. From hats and beards to full outfits and accessories. Celebrate Christmas with style and fun.
